## ✨ Summary

What changed, and why does it matter? Keep this to 1-3 short paragraphs.

## 🎯 Impact

- User-facing impact, if any
- Migration or compatibility impact, if any
- Main risk or review focus, if any

## 🧪 Test plan

- [ ] Build
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Manual verification

## 🍒 Cherry-pick notes (optional)

Call out whether this PR contains any commits that should be cherry-picked together, or any commits that are safe to take independently.

## 📝 Notes (optional)

Anything reviewers should know. Mention dependency / `Package.resolved` changes only if this PR actually changes them.
